patterns.title: Authentication
patterns.description: Three production-ready auth screens: Sign In with social providers, Sign Up with password strength, and Two-Factor OTP verification.

examples.title: Sign In
examples.code:
<!-- Sign In card with branding panel, social providers, email/password, remember me -->
<Flex Class="rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] overflow-hidden border border-border/40">
    <!-- Left branding panel -->
    <Stack Class="w-80 bg-primary p-10" Gap="6">
        <DynamicIcon Name="Zap" Class="h-5 w-5 text-primary-foreground" />
        <Heading Level="2" Class="text-2xl font-bold text-primary-foreground">
            The fastest way to ship products.
        </Heading>
    </Stack>

    <!-- Right form -->
    <Flex Class="flex-1 items-center justify-center bg-card p-12">
        <Stack Class="w-full max-w-sm" Gap="6">
            <Heading Level="2">Sign in</Heading>

            <!-- Social providers -->
            <Grid Class="grid-cols-3 gap-2">
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Class="gap-2">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="Chrome" Class="h-4 w-4" /> Google
                </Button>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Class="gap-2">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="Github" Class="h-4 w-4" /> GitHub
                </Button>
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Class="gap-2">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="Apple" Class="h-4 w-4" /> Apple
                </Button>
            </Grid>

            <!-- Email / Password -->
            <Stack Gap="4">
                <Lumeo.Input type="email" placeholder="jordan@acme.com">
                    <Prefix><DynamicIcon Name="Mail" Class="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" /></Prefix>
                </Lumeo.Input>
                <PasswordInput Placeholder="Enter your password" />
                <Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
                    <Checkbox @bind-Checked="_remember" />
                    <Label>Remember me for 30 days</Label>
                </Flex>
                <Button Class="w-full">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="LogIn" Class="h-4 w-4" /> Sign in
                </Button>
            </Stack>
        </Stack>
    </Flex>
</Flex>

examples.title: Two-Factor Verification
examples.code:
<!-- OTP Two-Factor card with countdown, backup code link, and trust badges -->
<Stack Class="max-w-md mx-auto" Gap="0">
    <Card Class="border-border/40">
        <CardHeader>
            <Flex Align="center" Gap="3">
                <Flex Class="h-10 w-10 items-center justify-center rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] bg-primary/10">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="ShieldCheck" Class="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
                </Flex>
                <Stack>
                    <Heading Level="2">Two-factor auth</Heading>
                    <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Code sent to j••••@acme.com</Lumeo.Text>
                </Stack>
            </Flex>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
            <Stack Gap="6">
                <Flex Class="rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] bg-muted/50 border border-border/40 px-4 py-3" Gap="3">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="Info" Class="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
                    <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Enter the 6-digit code. Expires in 5:00.</Lumeo.Text>
                </Flex>

                <Flex Justify="center">
                    <OtpInput Length="6" @bind-Value="_otp" OnComplete="HandleOtpComplete" />
                </Flex>

                <Button Class="w-full" IsLoading="_otpLoading" OnClick="HandleOtpVerify">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="ShieldCheck" Class="h-4 w-4" /> Verify code
                </Button>

                <Flex Justify="between">
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" OnClick="GoBack">Back</Button>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" OnClick="ResendCode">Resend code</Button>
                </Flex>
            </Stack>
        </CardContent>
    </Card>
</Stack>

@code {
    private string _otp = "";
    private bool _otpLoading;

    private async Task HandleOtpComplete(string otp) { if (otp.Length == 6) await HandleOtpVerify(); }
    private async Task HandleOtpVerify()
    {
        _otpLoading = true;
        await Task.Delay(1400);
        _otpLoading = false;
        ToastService.Success("Verified", "Welcome back!");
    }
    private void ResendCode() { _otp = ""; ToastService.Info("Resent", "New code sent."); }
    private void GoBack() { _otp = ""; }
}

patterns.title: Chat
patterns.description: A full messaging interface with contact list, conversation view, time-grouped messages, and message input bar.

examples.title: Chat Messaging Interface
examples.code:
<!-- Chat layout: contact sidebar | message thread -->
<Stack Class="w-full border border-border/40 rounded-xl overflow-hidden" style="height: 600px;">
    <Flex Class="h-full">

        <!-- Contact Sidebar -->
        <Flex Direction="col" Class="w-72 border-r border-border/40 bg-card">
            <Flex Class="items-center justify-between px-4 pt-4 pb-3 border-b border-border/40">
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-base font-bold text-foreground">Messages</Lumeo.Text>
                <Flex Class="items-center gap-1">
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="Search" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="SquarePen" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                </Flex>
            </Flex>
            <Stack Class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
                @foreach (var contact in _contacts)
                {
                    <button class="flex items-start gap-3 w-full px-3 py-2.5 hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors" @onclick="@(() => SelectContact(contact))">
                        <Stack Class="relative shrink-0">
                            <Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm">
                                <AvatarFallback>@contact.Initials</AvatarFallback>
                            </Avatar>
                            @if (contact.IsOnline)
                            {
                                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="absolute bottom-0 right-0 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-primary border-2 border-card block"></Lumeo.Text>
                            }
                        </Stack>
                        <Stack Class="flex-1 min-w-0 gap-0.5">
                            <Flex Class="items-center justify-between">
                                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground truncate">@contact.Name</Lumeo.Text>
                                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground">@contact.Timestamp</Lumeo.Text>
                            </Flex>
                            <Flex Class="items-center justify-between">
                                <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">@contact.LastMessage</Lumeo.Text>
                                @if (contact.UnreadCount > 0) { <Badge Class="ml-1 shrink-0 h-4 min-w-4 text-[10px] px-1">@contact.UnreadCount</Badge> }
                            </Flex>
                        </Stack>
                    </button>
                }
            </Stack>
        </Flex>

        <!-- Chat Area -->
        <Flex Direction="col" Class="flex-1 overflow-hidden bg-background">
            <!-- Header -->
            <Flex Class="items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 border-b border-border/40 bg-card">
                <Stack Class="relative">
                    <Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm"><AvatarFallback>PK</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="absolute bottom-0 right-0 h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full bg-primary border-2 border-card block"></Lumeo.Text>
                </Stack>
                <Stack>
                    <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">Priya Kapoor</Lumeo.Text>
                    <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs text-primary">Active now</Lumeo.Text>
                </Stack>
                <Flex Class="ml-auto items-center gap-1">
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="Phone" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="Video" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="Ellipsis" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                    </Button>
                </Flex>
            </Flex>

            <!-- Messages -->
            <Stack Class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-4 py-4 gap-1">
                <!-- Time group separator -->
                <Flex Class="items-center gap-3 my-3">
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="flex-1 h-px bg-border/40 block"></Lumeo.Text>
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Today</Lumeo.Text>
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="flex-1 h-px bg-border/40 block"></Lumeo.Text>
                </Flex>
                @foreach (var msg in _messages)
                {
                    <Flex Class="@(msg.IsSent ? \"items-end gap-2 justify-end\" : \"items-end gap-2 justify-start\")">
                        @if (!msg.IsSent)
                        {
                            <Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" Class="shrink-0 mb-1"><AvatarFallback>PK</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
                        }
                        <Stack Class="max-w-sm gap-1">
                            <Lumeo.Text As="div" Class="@(msg.IsSent ? \"rounded-2xl rounded-br-sm px-3.5 py-2.5 text-sm bg-primary text-primary-foreground\" : \"rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm px-3.5 py-2.5 text-sm bg-muted text-foreground\")">@msg.Text</Lumeo.Text>
                            <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground px-1">@msg.Time</Lumeo.Text>
                        </Stack>
                        @if (msg.IsSent)
                        {
                            <Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" Class="shrink-0 mb-1"><AvatarFallback>ME</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
                        }
                    </Flex>
                }
            </Stack>

            <!-- Input -->
            <Stack Class="border-t border-border/40 bg-card px-4 py-3 gap-2">
                <Flex Class="items-center gap-2 rounded-xl border border-border/40 bg-background px-3 py-2">
                    <Input placeholder="Type a message..." @bind-Value="_newMessage" Class="flex-1 border-0 shadow-none bg-transparent text-sm p-0 h-auto focus-visible:ring-0" />
                </Flex>
                <Flex Class="items-center justify-between">
                    <Flex Class="items-center gap-1">
                        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                            <DynamicIcon Name="Paperclip" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                        </Button>
                        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                            <DynamicIcon Name="Smile" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                        </Button>
                        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                            <DynamicIcon Name="Mic" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                        </Button>
                    </Flex>
                    <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" @onclick="SendMessage">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="Send" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5" /> Send
                    </Button>
                </Flex>
            </Stack>
        </Flex>
    </Flex>
</Stack>

@code {
    private void SendMessage()
    {
        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(_newMessage)) return;
        _messages.Add(new Message(_newMessage, true, DateTime.Now.ToString("h:mm tt")));
        _newMessage = string.Empty;
    }
}

patterns.title: Dashboard
patterns.description: A complete analytics dashboard built with Lumeo components. Includes a top bar, stats cards, revenue chart, activity feed, data table, and mini charts.

examples.title: Analytics Dashboard
examples.code:
<!-- Top Bar -->
<Flex Class="items-center justify-between gap-4 rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] bg-card px-4 py-3 shadow-sm">
    <Flex Class="items-center gap-3">
        <Flex Class="h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-md bg-primary">
            <DynamicIcon Name="BarChart3" Class="h-4 w-4 text-primary-foreground" />
        </Flex>
        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">Nexara</Lumeo.Text>
    </Flex>
    <Flex Class="flex-1 max-w-sm items-center gap-2 rounded-md border border-border/40 bg-background px-3 h-9">
        <DynamicIcon Name="Search" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
        <Input Placeholder="Search..." Class="h-8 flex-1 bg-transparent border-0 shadow-none" />
    </Flex>
    <Flex Class="items-center gap-1.5">
        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
            <DynamicIcon Name="Bell" Class="h-4 w-4" />
        </Button>
        <Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm">
            <AvatarFallback>PK</AvatarFallback>
        </Avatar>
        <DynamicIcon Name="ChevronDown" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
    </Flex>
</Flex>

<!-- Stats Row -->
<Grid Class="grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
    @foreach (var stat in _stats)
    {
        <Card Class="rounded-[var(--radius-lg)] border-border/40">
            <CardHeader Class="pb-2">
                <Flex Class="items-center justify-between">
                    <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wider">@stat.Label</Lumeo.Text>
                    <DynamicIcon Name="@stat.IconName" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
                </Flex>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent Class="pt-0">
                <Lumeo.Text Class="text-2xl font-bold text-foreground">@stat.Value</Lumeo.Text>
                <Flex Class="mt-1.5 items-center gap-1.5">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="@(stat.IsPositive ? "TrendingUp" : "TrendingDown")" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-xs font-semibold">@stat.Trend</Lumeo.Text>
                    <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground">vs last month</Lumeo.Text>
                </Flex>
                <Progress Value="@stat.ProgressValue" Class="mt-3 h-1" Variant="@stat.ProgressVariant" />
            </CardContent>
        </Card>
    }
</Grid>

<!-- Revenue Chart + Activity -->
<Grid Class="grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-7 gap-4">
    <Card Class="lg:col-span-5">
        <CardHeader>
            <Heading Level="3">Revenue Overview</Heading>
            <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm text-muted-foreground">12-month revenue vs. expenses</Lumeo.Text>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
            <AreaChart Categories="@_areaCategories" Series="@_areaSeries" Smooth="true" Gradient="true" Height="340px" />
        </CardContent>
    </Card>
    <Card Class="lg:col-span-2">
        <CardHeader>
            <Heading Level="3">Activity</Heading>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
            @foreach (var a in _activities)
            {
                <Flex Class="gap-2.5 py-2.5 border-b border-border/40 last:border-0 items-start hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors">
                    <Avatar Class="h-7 w-7 shrink-0"><AvatarFallback Class="text-[9px]">@a.Initials</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
                    <Stack Gap="0">
                        <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs">@a.Text</Lumeo.Text>
                        <Lumeo.Text Class="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">@a.Time</Lumeo.Text>
                    </Stack>
                </Flex>
            }
        </CardContent>
    </Card>
</Grid>

patterns.title: Multi-Step Form Wizard
patterns.description: A polished four-step onboarding wizard with progress steps, real field inputs, preferences, and a review summary before submission.

examples.title: Onboarding Wizard
examples.code:
<!-- 4-step onboarding wizard with Steps progress bar, side illustration, and review summary -->
<Stack Class="max-w-3xl mx-auto" Gap="4">

    <!-- Steps progress indicator -->
    <Card>
        <CardContent Class="py-4">
            <Steps CurrentStep="@(_currentStep - 1)" Class="w-full">
                <StepsItem Title="Account" Description="Credentials" />
                <StepsItem Title="Profile" Description="About you" />
                <StepsItem Title="Preferences" Description="Customize" />
                <StepsItem Title="Review" Description="Confirm" />
            </Steps>
        </CardContent>
    </Card>

    <Flex Gap="4" Class="lg:flex-row">
        <!-- Form Card -->
        <Card Class="flex-1">
            <CardHeader>
                <Flex Align="center" Gap="3">
                    <Flex Class="h-9 w-9 items-center justify-center rounded-[var(--radius)] bg-primary/10">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="UserPlus" Class="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
                    </Flex>
                    <Stack>
                        <Heading Level="3">Create your account</Heading>
                        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Set up your login credentials</Lumeo.Text>
                    </Stack>
                </Flex>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
                @if (_currentStep == 1)
                {
                    <!-- Step 1: First/Last name, Email, Password + PasswordInput with ShowStrength -->
                }
                @if (_currentStep == 2)
                {
                    <!-- Step 2: Job title, Department Select, Company, Country, Timezone, Bio Textarea -->
                }
                @if (_currentStep == 3)
                {
                    <!-- Step 3: Notification switches, Use-case RadioGroup in styled cards, Interest checkboxes -->
                }
                @if (_currentStep == 4)
                {
                    <!-- Step 4: Review sections with Edit links, Terms checkbox, Submit -->
                }
            </CardContent>
            <CardFooter>
                <Flex Justify="between" Class="w-full">
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" OnClick="PreviousStep" Disabled="@(_currentStep == 1)">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="ChevronLeft" Class="h-4 w-4" /> Back
                    </Button>
                    @if (_currentStep < 4)
                    {
                        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Default" OnClick="NextStep">
                            Continue <DynamicIcon Name="ChevronRight" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                        </Button>
                    }
                    else
                    {
                        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Default" OnClick="Submit" Disabled="@(!_confirmed)">
                            <DynamicIcon Name="Check" Class="h-4 w-4" /> Create Account
                        </Button>
                    }
                </Flex>
            </CardFooter>
        </Card>

        <!-- Side illustration / tips panel -->
        <Card Class="w-64 bg-muted/30 border-border/40">
            <CardContent Class="py-6">
                <!-- Step-specific icon, title, body copy, and tip bullets -->
            </CardContent>
        </Card>
    </Flex>
</Stack>

@code {
    private int _currentStep = 1;
    private bool _confirmed = false;

    private void NextStep() { if (_currentStep < 4) _currentStep++; }
    private void PreviousStep() { if (_currentStep > 1) _currentStep--; }
    private void Submit() { if (_confirmed) { /* create account */ } }
}

patterns.title: Mail
patterns.description: A three-column inbox with folder rail, message list, reading pane, and reply composer.

examples.title: Mail / Inbox
examples.code:
<!-- 3-column mail layout: icon rail | message list | reading pane -->
<Stack Class="w-full border border-border/40 rounded-xl overflow-hidden" style="height: 580px;">
    <Flex Class="h-full">

        <!-- Icon Rail -->
        <Flex Direction="col" Class="w-14 border-r border-border/40 bg-card items-center py-3 gap-1">
            <Stack Class="relative">
                <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Default" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-9 w-9">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="Inbox" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                </Button>
                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="absolute -top-1 -right-1 h-4 min-w-4 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground text-[10px] flex items-center justify-center px-1">3</Lumeo.Text>
            </Stack>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-9 w-9">
                <DynamicIcon Name="Send" Class="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-9 w-9">
                <DynamicIcon Name="FileEdit" Class="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-9 w-9">
                <DynamicIcon Name="Star" Class="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-9 w-9">
                <DynamicIcon Name="Trash2" Class="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
        </Flex>

        <!-- Message List -->
        <Flex Direction="col" Class="w-72 border-r border-border/40 bg-card">
            <Stack Gap="2" Class="p-3 border-b border-border/40">
                <Flex Class="relative items-center">
                    <DynamicIcon Name="Search" Class="absolute left-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
                    <Input placeholder="Search mail..." Class="pl-8 h-8 text-xs w-full" />
                </Flex>
                <Flex Class="items-center gap-1">
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Default" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" Class="h-7 text-xs">All</Button>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm" Class="h-7 text-xs">Unread</Button>
                    <Badge Class="ml-auto">3</Badge>
                </Flex>
            </Stack>
            <Stack Class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
                @foreach (var mail in _mailItems)
                {
                    <Stack Class="gap-1 px-3 py-2.5 border-b border-border/40 cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/40">
                        <Flex Class="items-center justify-between gap-2">
                            <Flex Class="items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
                                @if (!mail.IsRead) { <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-primary shrink-0 block"></Lumeo.Text> }
                                <Avatar Class="h-7 w-7"><AvatarFallback Class="text-[10px]">@mail.Initials</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
                                <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground truncate">@mail.Sender</Lumeo.Text>
                            </Flex>
                            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">@mail.Time</Lumeo.Text>
                        </Flex>
                        <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs font-semibold text-foreground pl-4 truncate">@mail.Subject</Lumeo.Text>
                        <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground pl-4 truncate">@mail.Preview</Lumeo.Text>
                    </Stack>
                }
            </Stack>
        </Flex>

        <!-- Reading Pane -->
        <Flex Direction="col" Class="flex-1 bg-background">
            <Stack Class="p-4 border-b border-border/40 bg-card">
                <Flex Class="items-start justify-between gap-4">
                    <Flex Class="items-start gap-3">
                        <Avatar><AvatarFallback>PK</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
                        <Stack>
                            <Lumeo.Text As="span" Class="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">Priya Kapoor</Lumeo.Text>
                            <Lumeo.Text Class="text-base font-semibold text-foreground mt-1">Re: Q2 roadmap review</Lumeo.Text>
                            <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">Apr 17, 2026, 9:42 AM</Lumeo.Text>
                        </Stack>
                    </Flex>
                    <Flex Class="items-center gap-1">
                        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                            <DynamicIcon Name="Archive" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                        </Button>
                        <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Icon" Class="h-8 w-8">
                            <DynamicIcon Name="Trash2" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                        </Button>
                    </Flex>
                </Flex>
            </Stack>
            <Stack Class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-5">
                <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm text-foreground leading-relaxed">Email body content...</Lumeo.Text>
            </Stack>
            <Separator />
            <Stack Gap="2" Class="p-3 bg-card">
                <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground">Reply to Priya Kapoor</Lumeo.Text>
                <Textarea placeholder="Write your reply..." Class="min-h-[70px] text-sm resize-none" />
                <Flex Class="justify-end gap-2">
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="Forward" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5" /> Forward
                    </Button>
                    <Button Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
                        <DynamicIcon Name="Send" Class="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5" /> Send
                    </Button>
                </Flex>
            </Stack>
        </Flex>
    </Flex>
</Stack>

patterns.title: Settings Page
patterns.description: A full settings layout with sidebar navigation, profile, account security, billing, notifications, team management, and danger zone.

examples.title: Settings
examples.code:
<!-- Settings Layout -->
<Flex Class="gap-8">
    <!-- Sidebar Nav -->
    <Stack Class="w-52 shrink-0 space-y-0.5">
        @foreach (var item in _sections) {
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Ghost"
                    Class="w-full justify-start gap-3"
                    @onclick="@(() => _activeSection = item.Id)">
                <DynamicIcon Name="@item.Icon" Class="h-4 w-4" />
                @item.Label
            </Button>
        }
    </Stack>
    <!-- Content -->
    <Stack Class="flex-1" Gap="6">
        @if (_activeSection == "profile") { /* Profile form */ }
        @if (_activeSection == "billing") { /* Plan, payment, invoices */ }
        @if (_activeSection == "team")    { /* Members, pending invites */ }
        @if (_activeSection == "account") {
            /* Password change, 2FA, sessions, danger zone */
            <Card>
                <CardHeader><Heading Level="3">Danger Zone</Heading></CardHeader>
                <CardContent>
                    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Destructive">Delete my account</Button>
                </CardContent>
            </Card>
        }
    </Stack>
</Flex>

patterns.title: Social Feed
patterns.description: A three-column social media layout with navigation rail, timeline feed with posts and interactions, and a right sidebar with trending topics and follow suggestions.

examples.title: Social Media Timeline
examples.code:
<!-- Three-column social feed layout -->
<Flex Class="w-full gap-0">

  <!-- Left Rail -->
  <Flex Direction="col" Class="w-56 shrink-0 pr-4 border-r border-border/40">
    <Flex Class="items-center gap-3 px-2 py-3">
      <Avatar><AvatarFallback>ME</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
      <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm font-semibold">You</Lumeo.Text>
    </Flex>
    <Separator />
    @foreach (var nav in _navItems)
    {
      <button class="flex items-center gap-3 w-full rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
                      @(nav.IsActive ? 'bg-accent text-accent-foreground' : 'text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent')">
        <DynamicIcon Name="@nav.Icon" Class="h-4 w-4" />
        @nav.Label
        @if (nav.Badge > 0) { <Badge Class="ml-auto">@nav.Badge</Badge> }
      </button>
    }
    <Button Class="w-full mt-2" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">
      <DynamicIcon Name="PenLine" Class="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> New Post
    </Button>
  </Flex>

  <!-- Center Feed -->
  <Stack Class="flex-1 px-6 min-w-0">
    <!-- Compose card -->
    <Card Class="mb-4 border-border/40">
      <CardContent Class="pt-4">
        <Flex Gap="3">
          <Avatar><AvatarFallback>ME</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
          <Stack Class="flex-1 gap-3">
            <Textarea AutoResize="true" placeholder="What's on your mind?" />
            <Button IsLoading="@_isPosting" OnClick="HandlePost">
              <DynamicIcon Name="Send" Class="h-4 w-4 mr-1.5" /> Post
            </Button>
          </Stack>
        </Flex>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>

    <!-- Post cards with like/comment/share/bookmark -->
    @foreach (var post in _posts) { /* ... */ }
  </Stack>

  <!-- Right Rail -->
  <Stack Class="w-64 shrink-0 pl-4 border-l border-border/40 gap-4">
    <Input placeholder="Search..." Class="pl-9" />

    <!-- Trending topics -->
    <Card Class="border-border/40">
      <CardHeader><Heading Level="4">Trending</Heading></CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        @foreach (var t in _trending) { /* tag + post count */ }
      </CardContent>
    </Card>

    <!-- Who to follow -->
    <Card Class="border-border/40">
      <CardHeader><Heading Level="4">Who to Follow</Heading></CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        @foreach (var s in _suggestions)
        {
          <Flex Class="items-center gap-3 py-2.5">
            <Avatar Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm"><AvatarFallback>@s.Initials</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
            <Stack Class="flex-1 min-w-0">
              <Lumeo.Text Class="text-sm font-medium">@s.Name</Lumeo.Text>
              <Lumeo.Text Class="text-xs text-muted-foreground">@s.Followers followers</Lumeo.Text>
            </Stack>
            <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline" Size="Button.ButtonSize.Sm">Follow</Button>
          </Flex>
        }
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  </Stack>

</Flex>
